properties.name: Central Salish Sea Context
properties.disclaimer: Illustrative contextual geography only; not a legal jurisdiction boundary.
properties.notes: Simplified overlapping territory intended to foreground Indigenous presence around Seattle, Elliott Bay, and adjacent inland watersheds.

properties.name: North Sound Context
properties.region: Bellingham Bay and northern inland waters
properties.disclaimer: Illustrative contextual geography only; not a legal jurisdiction boundary.
properties.notes: Simplified contextual layer for northern Salish Sea communities and cross-border Indigenous geographies in Whatcom and Skagit areas.

properties.name: South Sound Context
properties.disclaimer: Illustrative contextual geography only; not a legal jurisdiction boundary.
properties.notes: Simplified contextual layer for the southern Sound, where tribal lands, port geographies, and county-state systems often intersect in MMIP narratives.
